notes: EXAMPLE TEMPLATE ONLY — not wired by configs/default.json. Replace every scale/sign/source with real metrology authority before use. The numeric scale below is a SCHEMA ILLUSTRATION (1.0 identity after an explicit unit_resolution), not a published MAST V→T factor. Do not copy fabricated sensitivities into production.

b_field_pol_probe_cc_field.source: EXAMPLE: FAIR-MAST Level-2 attrs units='T' vs label='Tesla/sec'; explicit authority must choose. This example chooses T/s (dB/dt) so FreeGSNKE equilibrium pickup synth must NOT be enabled.
b_field_pol_probe_cc_field.notes: When resolved_units is not T or Wb, synthesize must stay false.

OMV_110_EXAMPLE.source: EXAMPLE_PLACEHOLDER — replace with real calibration citation (memo/DOI/UDA table). scale=1.0 is NOT a real V→T factor.
OMV_110_EXAMPLE.notes: Schema illustration: after a real V→T scale is provided, FreeGSNKE can synthesize OMV_110 via calculate_pickup_value (geometry already in machine_authority).

SADDLE_EXAMPLE_CALIBRATE_ONLY.source: EXAMPLE_PLACEHOLDER — saddle has no FreeGSNKE synthesizer; calibrate for audit/future contracts only.
SADDLE_EXAMPLE_CALIBRATE_ONLY.notes: synthesize must remain false for saddle.
